unique_vulnerabilities.name: Reentrancy in withdraw()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: All findings reference the external call on line 19 followed by state access or modification on line 20, indicating a reentrancy vulnerability.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Unchecked return value in withdraw()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding highlights the unchecked return value of the external call on line 19, which is distinct from the reentrancy issue.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Unprotected Ether withdrawal in withdraw()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding describes a lack of access control allowing arbitrary Ether withdrawal, which is separate from reentrancy or unchecked return issues.
